policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-redis-01 - Block Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Redis#IncidentremediationRedis#drcp-redis-01 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Redis Block Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the deployment of Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise. Azure Cache for Redis is generic blocked.

drcp.name: RedisBlockRedisEnterprise
drcp.controlDesc: Block Azure Cache for Redis and Azure Cache for Redis Enterprise

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
